decisions.title: Daemon entry point migration
decisions.decision: Replace index.mjs default — index.mjs becomes the attach proxy by default. `npx airtable-user-mcp` auto-attaches to running daemon or falls back to in-process stdio. No separate `attach.ts` CLI entry needed.
decisions.fallback: Poll up to 15s then fall back to in-process stdio (same as Perplexity pattern). No --no-daemon flag needed at entry; fallback is automatic.
